category_sources: Official README describes httpry as a tool for displaying and logging HTTP traffic.
source_facts.description says httpry is a packet sniffer for displaying and logging HTTP traffic.
display_name_sources: Official repository title and README use httpry.
docs_sources: Official source_facts.homepage/source_facts.repo is the GitHub project; README and bundled doc files are the best official documentation surfaces found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/jbittel/httpry; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README says httpry captures, parses, and logs live HTTP traffic for later analysis.
source_facts.description mentions packet sniffer, displaying, and logging HTTP traffic.
